tasks.title: Structural tests for agent definitions, code review guide, and AI failure mode checklist
tasks.model_rationale: Single-file bash test script with clear structural assertions — no architectural judgment
tasks.summary: Created tests/sdl-workflow/test-code-review-structural.sh with 24 TAP tests. 22 fail (target files not yet created), 2 pass (negative tool-exclusion checks on non-existent files). Script runs cleanly.

tasks.title: Structural tests for skill file routing, reference files, and implement skill update
tasks.model_rationale: Single-file bash test script with clear structural assertions — no architectural judgment
tasks.summary: Created tests/sdl-workflow/test-code-review-skill.sh with 16 TAP tests. 14 fail (skill files not yet created), 2 pass (negative checks). Script runs cleanly.

tasks.title: Integration and e2e tests for cross-file consistency, detection-verification loop, and cleanup mode
tasks.model_rationale: Creates test fixtures and multi-file integration tests requiring cross-file consistency understanding
tasks.summary: Created 6 test fixture files + integration test script (20 tests). Initial run: 19/20 pass — test 7 caught real gap: Challenger agent body missing S-NN ID format reference. Fixed by adding S-NN notation to Challenger verification protocol. All 20 tests now pass.

tasks.title: AI failure mode checklist with 10 patterns and detection heuristics
tasks.model_rationale: Single markdown file with enumerated content — no design decisions
tasks.summary: Created home/dot-claude/docs/sdl-workflow/ai-failure-modes.md with 10 numbered failure mode entries, detection heuristics, and key pattern keywords. Tests 22-24 pass.

tasks.title: Code review guide with behavioral comparison methodology, finding format, and retrospective fields
tasks.model_rationale: Single markdown file with structured content following spec-defined schemas — no design decisions
tasks.summary: Created home/dot-claude/docs/sdl-workflow/code-review-guide.md with behavioral comparison methodology, sighting/finding format schemas, 4 category values, orchestration protocol, source of truth handling, and 6 retrospective fields. Tests 15-21 pass.

tasks.title: Detector and Challenger agent definitions with correct tool allowlists and description language
tasks.model_rationale: Two small markdown files following an existing agent definition pattern — no design decisions
tasks.summary: Created code-review-detector.md and code-review-challenger.md agent definitions. First attempt failed (wrote to ~/.claude/ instead of project path). Retry with explicit path correction succeeded. All 24 structural tests pass.

tasks.title: Skill entry point with dual-mode routing and path-specific reference files
tasks.model_rationale: Three files with cross-references requiring architectural coherence between skill routing, agent spawning, and methodology injection
tasks.summary: Created SKILL.md + existing-code-review.md + post-impl-review.md. Skill routes between conversational and post-impl paths, references agents by name, loads shared docs. All 16 skill structure tests pass.

tasks.model_rationale: Single-line addition to an existing file at a specified location — no design decisions
tasks.summary: Added stage-transition prompt to implement SKILL.md asking user if they want a code review. Tests 17-18 pass.
